event: Angels in a boat on the seashore
symbols: white wings on human figures — angelic identity transposed into a contemporary earthly setting
boat on shore — a vessel of passage or mission, recalling the fishermen apostles
rocky coastline — the boundary between worlds, land and sea
description: A photographic image showing five men wearing white feathered wings, standing and sitting in a small blue rowboat beached on a dark pebble shore. One figure rows, another leans forward, and others sit or stand in various poses. Rocky cliffs and calm sea extend into the background under an overcast sky. The scene is staged and theatrical, blending the mundane setting of a beach with the iconography of angels.
